evals.prompt: Create a new ward for user authentication
evals.expected_output: Agent asks for epic (or suggests existing ones), runs wdd ward create, writes full spec in the ward file, sets status to red, writes test file, presents tests, and STOPs.
assertions: Agent asks about or suggests an epic before creating
Agent runs wdd ward create with name and epic
Agent writes a full spec with Scope, Tests table, Must NOT, Must DO sections
Agent writes test file matching the Tests table
Agent runs wdd ward status <id> red
Agent STOPs and presents tests for approval before implementing

evals.prompt: Add a feature for response caching
evals.expected_output: Agent treats this as ward creation, not direct implementation. Asks for details, creates ward, writes spec and tests, STOPs for approval.
assertions: Agent does NOT start writing implementation code directly
Agent creates a ward for the feature
Agent writes tests before any implementation
